result.stdout:
CapyDb CLI - Database migrations using EF Core + Liquibase

USAGE:
  cap [command] [options]

GENERAL:
  cap --help | -h         Show this help
  cap --version | -v      Show version
  cap doctor              Check environment (Liquibase, Docker, etc)
  cap bye                 Show goodbye message

MIGRATIONS:
  cap migrations add <name> [options]
      Create migration from EF Core DbContext
      --assembly <path.dll>    Assembly with DbContext
      --context <class>        DbContext class name
      --author <name>          Author (or use CAPY_AUTHOR env var)
      --no-stubs               Skip CSV stub generation
      --connection <string>    Connection string

  cap migrations import-ef --assembly <dll> --name <Migration> [options]
      --provider <db>
      Import existing EF Core migration (providers: sqlserver, postgres, mysql, generic)

  cap migrations mergeschemas [--scope common|mssql|postgres|mysql] [--include-merged]
      Merge schema files

  cap migrations delete <file> [options]
      [--defaults <props>] [--docker]
      Delete migration changeset

DATABASE OPERATIONS:
  cap plan                      Preview pending migrations
  cap apply                     Apply migrations to database
  cap status                    Show migration status
  cap validate                  Validate changelog
  cap tag <name>                Tag current state
  cap rollback count <N>        Rollback N changesets
  cap rollback to-tag <tag>     Rollback to tag
  cap clear-checksums           Clear checksums
  cap drop-all                  Drop all objects (DANGEROUS!)

  Common options: [--defaults <props>] [--docker] [--workdir <dir>] [--output <file>] [--logs]

DATA LOADING (carga):
  cap carga from-csv --input <csv> --table <name> [--output <yaml>] [--add-to-master]
  cap carga update        Apply data loading
  cap carga status        Show status
  cap carga rollback      Rollback data
  cap carga drop-all      Drop all data tables
  cap carga reset         Reset history

UTILITIES:
  cap drift detect        Detect schema drift
  cap squash --tag <tag>  Squash migrations

CONFIGURATION:
  Liquibase config auto-detected from:
    ./db/changelog/liquibase.properties (recommended)
    ./liquibase.properties
  Use --defaults for custom path.

  Environment variables:
    LIQUIBASE_HOME  Path to Liquibase (default: C:\Program Files\liquibase)
    CAPY_AUTHOR     Default author for migrations

CapyDb CLI - Database migrations using EF Core + Liquibase

USAGE:
  cap [command] [options]

GENERAL:
  cap --help | -h         Show this help
  cap --version | -v      Show version
  cap doctor              Check environment (Liquibase, Docker, etc)
  cap bye                 Show goodbye message

      --connection <string>    Connection string
